Hero.eyebrow: AI ad auditor for TikTok & Reels
Hero.subcopy: Upload a TikTok ad, Reel, or UGC clip and get an AI audit that finds your weak hook, dead air, unclear CTA, and missing trust signals — with the exact fix for each, scored before you publish.

AuditCard.fixDetail: Cut to the product in-hand at 0:01

SignIn.introTitle: Pick up where your last audit left off.
SignIn.introCopy: Your scores, saved fixes, and re-cuts are waiting. Sign in to keep climbing toward the FYP.

items.0: Hook lands in 0:02 — strong cold open

SignIn.socialProof: Trusted by creators who've audited 120k+ ads before posting.
SignIn.title: Sign in
SignIn.subtitle: Get back to your audits and saved fixes.
SignIn.legal: Protected sign-in · By continuing you agree to our Terms & Privacy.

AuditUpload.title: Why will this video pop or flop?
AuditUpload.copy: Drop your TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts ad. In about 90 seconds you'll get a full audit — hook, retention, dead air, CTA, trust, and the exact fix for each, before you publish.

dropzone.title: Drop your video here to audit it
dropzone.formats: MP4 or MOV · vertical 9:16 · up to 3 min

ready.privacy: We analyze your video only to generate this audit. It's never shared or used for external training.

brief.title: Tell us about this ad
brief.copy: All optional — but the more the AI knows about your ad, the sharper the fixes and the more accurate the goal detection.
brief.goalLabel: What's the goal of this ad?
brief.destinationLabel: Is there a link or page viewers can act on?
brief.notesLabel: Anything you want the audit to focus on?
brief.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Is the hook strong enough? Does the CTA clearly point viewers to the link?

AuditUpload.progressHint: This can take up to 3 minutes while the AI reviews the video.

errors.chooseVideo: Choose a video file before starting the audit.
errors.tooLarge: The selected video is larger than the 500MB limit.
errors.unsupportedType: Upload an MP4, MOV, or WebM video.
errors.unexpectedFormat: The analysis response was not in the expected format.
errors.failed: The analysis failed. Try again with a different video.

loading.title: Auditing “{fileName}”
loading.copy: Watching it the way the algorithm — and your buyer — will.
loading.failedCopy: The analysis stopped before the report could be created.

report.title: Here's your creative audit
report.scoreAfterFixes: Score after your {count, plural, one {# fix} other {# fixes}}
report.liftPrediction: The lift is a prediction after the edits below.
report.fixesHeading: The {count, plural, one {# fix that matters most} other {# fixes that matter most}}
report.emptyFixes: The analysis did not find a meaningful problem worth forcing into the report. Publish with normal platform testing.
report.editorCopy: The {count, plural, one {# fix is} other {# fixes are}} a copy-paste task list — paste it straight to whoever cuts the next version.
report.fallbackRecommendation: Publish after {count, plural, one {# fix} other {# fixes}}.
report.noFixesFallback: This creative is already in good shape.
